title: In Memoriam: BSNC Shareholder Perry Mendenhall
summary: BSNC offers its condolences to the family and friends of former BSNC Board Director Perry Mendenhall. Mendenhall served as BSNC Director from 2001 to 2007. He was active in his community and served the region and state for 40 years on the boards of Sitnasuak Native Corporation, Nome Eskimo Community...

title: Nike Site Summit
summary: Friends of Nike Site Summit maintain and provide tours of a Cold War era missile defense site on top of Mount Gordon Lyons near Anchorage. The post Nike Site Summit appeared first on Alaska Magazine .
